objects.name: RooVeterinaryInc.roo-cline
objects.description: Roo Code (Roo-Cline): autonomous AI coding agent - full filesystem and terminal access - executes commands and modifies code - sends context to external LLM providers [risky-ai-code-access]

objects.name: saoudrizwan.claude-dev
objects.description: Cline (Claude Dev): autonomous AI coding agent - reads writes and executes code - can run terminal commands - creates files and modifies codebase - sends context to LLM APIs [risky-ai-code-access]

objects.name: formulahendry.code-runner
objects.description: Code Runner: executes code in 40+ languages from VS Code with one click - runs arbitrary scripts with full system privileges - can execute any file type including shell scripts and binaries [risky-code-execution]

objects.name: MS-vsliveshare.vsliveshare
objects.description: Live Share: real-time collaborative editing with shared terminals - servers and debugging sessions - guests can see and edit files - run terminals and access forwarded ports - sessions joinable by anyone with link [risky-collaboration]

objects.name: hashicorp.vault
objects.description: HashiCorp Vault: browse and read secrets from Vault servers directly in VS Code - enterprise secret management infrastructure access from IDE - vault tokens accessible to extensions [risky-credential-access]

objects.name: eliostruyf.vscode-remote-control
objects.description: Remote Control: allows remote control of VS Code via HTTP API - run commands from anywhere on the network - can be exploited for unauthorized command execution [risky-remote-access]

objects.name: mandrup.remote-rdp
objects.description: Remote - RDP: manages and launches Remote Desktop sessions from VS Code - stored RDP credentials - can be used for lateral movement to Windows machines [risky-remote-access]

objects.name: ms-vscode-remote.remote-ssh
objects.description: Remote - SSH: opens folders on remote machines via SSH with full VS Code capabilities - installs VS Code Server on remote hosts - enables full filesystem access and command execution [risky-remote-access]

objects.name: ms-vscode-remote.vscode-remote-extensionpack
objects.description: Remote Development Extension Pack: bundle of Remote SSH + Dev Containers + WSL + Tunnels - all remote access capabilities in one install [risky-remote-access]

objects.name: ms-vscode.remote-server
objects.description: Remote - Tunnels: creates secure tunnels to remote machines via Microsoft dev tunnels - enables full remote control of any machine running VS Code without SSH - bypasses corporate firewalls and network segmentation [risky-remote-access]

objects.name: IvanArjona.cloudflaretunnel
objects.description: Cloudflare Tunnel: exposes local services through Cloudflare network - bypasses corporate firewalls - local services become accessible via Cloudflare URLs without opening inbound ports [risky-tunnel]

objects.name: nicobao.localtunnel
objects.description: LocalTunnel: exposes local server to the internet via localtunnel.me - instant public URL for any local port - bypasses firewall without configuration [risky-tunnel]

objects.name: philnash.ngrok-for-vscode
objects.description: ngrok for VSCode: creates ngrok tunnels exposing local ports to the public internet - bypasses firewalls via reverse tunnels - can be used for data exfiltration or unauthorized remote access [risky-tunnel]

objects.name: tailscale.vscode-tailscale
objects.description: Tailscale: connects to Tailscale mesh VPN network - access remote file systems - Tailscale Funnel can expose local services to the public internet - bypasses corporate network controls [risky-tunnel]

objects.name: Continue.continue
objects.description: Continue: open-source AI code assistant - sends code context to LLM providers (OpenAI Anthropic Ollama) for completions and chat - codebase context shared with third-party providers [risky-ai-code-access]

objects.name: GitHub.copilot
objects.description: GitHub Copilot: AI code assistant - sends code context to GitHub/OpenAI servers for completions - source code transmitted to external cloud - may include proprietary code and secrets in context [risky-ai-code-access]

objects.name: GitHub.copilot-chat
objects.description: GitHub Copilot Chat: AI chat assistant with codebase awareness - sends code context and questions to cloud - can access workspace files and terminal output [risky-ai-code-access]

objects.name: sourcegraph.cody-ai

objects.description: Supermaven: AI code completion - sends code context to Supermaven cloud for fast completions - external processing of source code [risky-ai-code-access]

objects.name: TabNine.tabnine-vscode

objects.name: Postman.postman-for-vscode

objects.name: rangav.vscode-thunder-client
objects.description: Thunder Client: REST API client with auth credential storage - not open source - credentials go through closed-source code - stored API keys and tokens in collections [risky-api-client]

objects.name: GoogleCloudTools.cloudcode
objects.description: Cloud Code: Google Cloud Platform integration - deploy to GKE Cloud Run - manage APIs and resources - uses gcloud credentials [risky-cloud-access]

objects.name: ms-azuretools.vscode-azurefunctions
objects.description: Azure Functions: create deploy and manage Azure Functions from VS Code - deploys code to cloud - Azure credential access [risky-cloud-access]

objects.name: ms-azuretools.vscode-azureresourcegroups
objects.description: Azure Resources: browse and manage Azure resources directly from VS Code - Azure subscription access from IDE - can view and manage cloud resources [risky-cloud-access]

objects.name: ms-azuretools.vscode-azurestorage

objects.name: ms-azuretools.vscode-docker
